mapper.select: select id, section_type, title, summary, hot_score, sort_no, display_status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from home_sections where id = #{id} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update home_sections set section_type = #{sectionType}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, hot_score = #{hotScore}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, display_status = #{displayStatus}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
